sentences.translation: Muhammed je letio avionom po prvi put.
sentences.translationEn: Muhammad traveled by plane for the first time.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ خَائِفًا فِي الْبِدَايَةِ لَكِنَّهُ هَدَأَ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ.
sentences.translation: Bio je uplašen u početku ali se smirio poslije.
sentences.translationEn: He was scared at first but calmed down afterward.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَ مِنَ النَّافِذَةِ وَرَأَى الْغُيُومَ تَحْتَهُ.
sentences.translation: Gledao je kroz prozor i vidio oblake ispod sebe.
sentences.translationEn: He looked out the window and saw clouds below him.

sentences.translation: Avion je sletio sigurno i zahvalio je Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: The plane landed safely and he thanked God.
